title: CB Multipart
description: An opensource library for having multiple things in one block space.
body:
CB Multipart (formerly known as Forge Multipart) is an Open Source library for allowing multiple functional blocks within a single block space.

CB Multipart includes the multipart API, Micro blocks, and vanilla Multipart/Microblock support.

Please see our GitHub repository for maven/dependency information if you wish to use CB Multipart as a Library.

We are partnered with [CreeperHost](https://www.creeperhost.net/partner/covers1624vpp)! Use promo code `covers1624vpp` at checkout for 15% off your first month
